description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel case Dial style: Black circular dial, with white rims, black hands and hour markers, weekday and date indicator at the 3 hour mark Features: Branding at the 12 hour mark, markings on the inner rim, screw to reset time Strap style: Metal bracelet with a butterfly clasp Water resistant Warranty: 1 year from the date of purchase
